title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on globalisation and cultural identity.

questions.question: Do you think globalisation is making cultures more similar, and is this a good or a bad thing?
How important is it for people to maintain their cultural identity in an increasingly globalised world?

script.text: Do you think globalisation is making cultures more similar, and is this a good or a bad thing?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
